results.name: JWT alg:none attack rejected
results.fix: Ensure JJWT is configured with explicit allowed algorithms: JwtParserBuilder.requireSignedWith(...)

results.name: CSP header present on app/
results.message: CSP header present on app/ — OK
results.fix: Add CSP header in nginx: add_header Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self';..."

results.name: CSP: no unsafe-inline scripts
results.message: CSP contains unsafe-inline: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' unpkg.com cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' '
results.fix: Replace unsafe-inline with nonce-based CSP

results.name: Clickjacking protection (X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors)
results.message: Clickjacking protection (X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors) — OK
results.fix: Add: add_header X-Frame-Options DENY in nginx config

results.name: Sensitive path not publicly accessible: /actuator
results.message: Sensitive path not publicly accessible: /actuator — OK
results.fix: Block /actuator in nginx: add 'location /actuator { return 403; }'  (before other location blocks)

results.fix: Block /actuator/env in nginx: add 'location /actuator/env { return 403; }'  (before other location blocks)

results.name: Auth timing consistent (diff=1ms)
results.fix: Use constant-time comparison; always run bcrypt.check() even for non-existent users

results.name: Playwright tests completed in time
results.fix: Increase timeout or reduce number of UI tests

results.name: Auth ramp p95=53661ms ≤ 8000ms
results.fix: Auth service is slow under load: add connection pooling; check bcrypt work factor

results.name: DNS burst p95=431331ms ≤ 5000ms
results.fix: DNS resolver slow under burst: add Redis caching, optimize UDP upstream

results.name: Analytics API p95=15594ms ≤ 8000ms
results.message: Analytics API p95=15594ms too slow under load
results.fix: Add @Cacheable to analytics hot endpoints; optimize DB queries

results.fix: Verify WebSocket endpoint at /ws is reachable; check nginx proxy_pass WebSocket headers
